title: premna oblongata
intro: Premna oblongata, also known as Premna tomentosa or Egyptian privet, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. Premna oblongata has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. It is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is valued for its therapeutic properties.
